case_title: FLYING DUTCHMAN PARKING CO. VS DOBBS MARY MS. C/O ANDERSEN CONSULTING

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO MARY DOBBS (ANDERSEN CON- SULTING) RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $218.02 FILED BY FLYING DUTCHMAN PARKING CO. AS TO DEFENDANT DOBBS MARY MS. C/O ANDERSEN CONSULTING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLYING DUTCHMAN PARKING CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOBBS MARY MS. C/O ANDERSEN CONSULTING $218.02 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $230.81 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DOBBS MARY MS. C/O ANDERSEN CONSULTING
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $279.01 AS TO DEFENDANT DOBBS MARY MS. C/O ANDERSEN CONSULTING
